title: Brutal: 10-Year-Old Boy Screams In Pain As Maulana Rains Lashes On Him With Stick At Saharahpur Madrasa | VIDEO
description: A deeply alarming video has surfaced from a madrasa in Saharanpur, Uttar Pradesh, where a maulana was purportedly seen brutally beating a 10-year-old boy with a stick as the former yelped in pain.
